title: Unified Information-Density Theory (UIDT) v3.9 - Canonical Framework: High-Precision Vacuum Spectral Gap Verification and Chromomagnetic Splitting Modules
description: The Canonical Framework of the Unified Information-Density Theory (UIDT) v3.9. This release provides the complete formal environment for the 80-digit high-precision verification of the vacuum spectral gap Δ* = 1.71003504674... GeV [Evidence Category A] and the kinetic Gamma invariant γ = 16.339 [Category A-]. It specifically addresses the Ξcc isospin splitting prediction (1.504 MeV) and includes a formal request for integration with HAL QCD Lattice data to determine the cc-diquark NBS wave function |ψ_cc(0)|².
notes: Evidence Classification: Δ* (Category A), γ (Category A-), ΔM_Xi_cc (Category B/D). All calculations performed with 80-digit mpmath precision. Residuals for Category A claims < 10⁻⁴⁰. Contact: uidt-framework@outlook.com
